mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM tb_user WHERE hp_no = #{hpNo} AND user_name=#{userName} AND TO_CHAR(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN str_date AND COALESCE(end_date, '29991231') AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT password, user_id, user_seq FROM tb_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND hp_no = #{hpNo} AND user_name=#{userName} AND TO_CHAR(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN str_date AND COALESCE(end_date, '29991231') AND use_yn = 'Y'
